text: Notwithstanding any other provisions of this code, an ambulance may be equipped with clearance and side-marker lamps.

# Vehicle Code
## Division 12. EQUIPMENT OF VEHICLES [24000 - 28244]
### Chapter 2. Lighting Equipment [24250 - 26106]
#### Article 6. Side and Fender Lighting Equipment [25100 - 25110]
##### § 25100.1

Notwithstanding any other provisions of this code, an ambulance may be equipped with clearance and side-marker lamps.

*(Added by Stats. 1975, Ch. 616.)*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other provisions of this code, an ambulance may be equipped with clearance and side-marker lamps.
